# quick-create

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Quick-create section for the Pages landing surface: template tiles (blank, to-do, bulleted list) that create and open a new page.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PagesWelcome.Section` → `QuickCreateSection`
  - Uses: `apps/pages/page-tree.createPageWithSeed`, `apps/pages/page-tree.pageDetailPane`, `apps/pages/welcome.PagesWelcome`, `primitives/css/card.Card`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
